title: Uncharted Seas
writer: George Elwood Jenks, John Fleming Wilson
actors: Alice Lake, Carl Gerard, Rudolph Valentino
plot: Persuaded by her father-in-law to give her negligent and drunken husband one more chance, Lucretia Eastman accompanies him on an expedition to the Arctic Circle, but Eastman turns back out of fear. Another ship, commanded by Frank...
